<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 qbitOS / ugrad.ai. All rights reserved.
Principal: Tad R. Ericson · AI tooling: Cursor, Claude, GPT, Mistral-class (assistive; human review)
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
Source: https://github.com/qbitOS/ugrad
Provenance: org-wide-compliance-baseline-seed
-->

# qbitos{ugrad} Compliance Baseline

**Maintainer:** Tad R. Ericson · qbitOS / ugrad.ai

## Compliance Root

- Canonical policy: <https://github.com/qbitOS/compliance>

## Runtime Path

`DAC -> Iron Line -> Prefixes -> Quantum Gutter -> .qbit -> preflight`

## Control Envelope

`DAC/Prefix/Steno/Iron-Line/Preflight/search-history controls`

## Repository scope

This repository is the **qbitOS org umbrella** for μgrad-related documentation. Child repos (e.g. [ugrad-gameHUB](https://github.com/qbitOS/ugrad-gameHUB)) carry their own baselines; application code lives primarily in [qbitOS/uvspeed](https://github.com/qbitOS/uvspeed).

## Extended IP, privacy, and contact

See [COMPLIANCE.md](COMPLIANCE.md) for trademark disclaimers, privacy notes, enterprise expectations, and issue routing.
